raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu fargajś jelle/ un ne
dserr ne kahdu Wihnu nedś stip-
ru Dsehreenu / un ne ehd ne nee-
ka/ kas nefchkihsts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo redś/ tu tapśi gruhta/ un
dseindeţi weenu Dehlu/ us ka
Galwu ne buhs ne kahdam dsen-
namam Nasim nahkt/ jo tas Pui-
fis buhs weens Deewa Nazare-
eris no Mahtes-Meesahm / un
wiꞥſch fahks Israëln tspestiht no
to Wihlistern Rohfas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze fchi Seewa/ un
runnaja us fawu Wibru/un faz-
zija : weens Deewa Wihrs nah-
ze pee mannis / winna Gihmis
bija ka weena Deewa Engeła
Gihmis tohti bibhajams/ un es
ne waizaju winnu / no kurrenes
tas bija/ un wiꞥſch nian arri no
fawa Wahrdä ne dewe Sirnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiꞥſch fazzija us man:
Redś/ tu tapśi gruhta un dsem-
dest weenu Dehlu/ un nu nedser
Wihnu nedś stipru Dsehreenu /
nedś ehd jeb fo/ kas nefchkihsts
irr/ jo tas Puifis buhs weens
Deewa Nazareeris no Mahtes-
Meesahm/ lihds patt fatwas Nah-
wes Deenat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peeluhdse Manous to
KUNgu/ un fazzija: Ak KUNgs!
laid jelle tas Deewa Wihrs / fo
tu fuhtijs eſti / atkah pee mums
nahk/ un muhs mahza/ kas mums
tam Pusscham irr jadarra / kas
dsimś.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Deewa klaustja Mano-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "us Batfsnt/ un tas Deewa Enge-
gelis nahze atkah pee tahs See-
was/ bet winna fehdeja Tihru-
mā/bet Manous winnas Wihrs
ne bija pee winnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Seewa tranzahs/
un tezzeja / un pafazztia to fa-
wam Wihran/un fazztia us to:
Redś/ tas Wihrs irr mann rah-
dijees / kas tai Deenā pee man
nahze.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs Manous/ un
gahje fawai Seewai pakkat / un
nahze pee ta Wihra / un fazzija
us to: Eſti tu tas Wihrs/ kas
tu us to Seewu eſti runnajs?
un tas fazzija: Es pats eſinu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Manous :
kad nu tas notiks / ko tu fazzijs/
kahda Wihse tad buhs tam Put-
scham/ un kahds buhs winna
Darbs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Engelis
fazzija us Manou : No wiſta/ko
cs us to Seewu eſinu runnajs
buhs winnat fargatees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winrai ne buhs ehst no
jebkurra/kas no Wihna-Rohka is-
ang/ un Wihnu nedś stipru Dseh-
reenu winrai ne buhsdsehrt/ nedś
ehst/. kas nefchkihsts irr / wiſfn /
fo cs winrai eſinu pawehlejs/
buhs winrai turreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Manous us
ta KUNGA Engeli: Lat mehs/
luhdsans/ tevo usturrarn/ un
weenu Kaslenu taiwā Preefscha
fataifam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija ta KUNGA
Engelis us Manou: Jepscbu tu
Rrr
mann
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
